tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Young Goalkeeper's Dream Realized: Paraguay Stuns Germany in World Cup Shootout
stories.summary: First-time World Cup goalkeeper Orlando Gill defeated his idol Manuel Neuer to send underdog Paraguay past four-time champions Germany on penalties.

stories.headline: From Hospital Bed to World Cup Starter: A Son's Unshakeable Belief
stories.summary: After a career-threatening injury, Giuliano Simeone started for Argentina against Jordan three years later, fulfilling a promise he made from his darkest moment.

stories.headline: Officer Rents Movie Theater So 144 Students Get Their First Big-Screen Experience
stories.summary: Phoenix school resource officer Sean Reavie rented an entire theatre for low-income middle schoolers to watch Toy Story 5, gifting many their first cinema memory.

stories.headline: Theatre Community's Gift Opens 'Whole New Chapter' for Pat Alexander
stories.summary: Brockville volunteers surprised longtime theatre member Pat Alexander with a donated vehicle, restoring her independence and joy.

stories.headline: Two Neighbors Stayed Behind in Evacuation to Feed the Village's Dogs
stories.summary: When residents fled wildfire danger, two compassionate people remained to care for abandoned pets, refusing to leave them alone.

stories.headline: Lundy's Puffins Soar from 13 to 1,335: Island's Seabird Recovery Reaches 40-Year High
stories.summary: Lundy Island's puffin population exploded from just 13 to 1,335 after rat removal, reaching the highest seabird count since the 1930s.

stories.headline: Serena Returns to Tennis for Her Daughters and Savors Every Moment
stories.summary: After four years away, Serena Williams played her heart out in her comeback match, cherishing the chance to perform for her daughters.

stories.headline: Restaurant Owner Feeds Wildfire Victims Every Day, Honoring Community That Helped Her
stories.summary: A Pueblo business owner opened her doors daily with free meals for families displaced by wildfires, repaying the kindness she once received.

stories.headline: Breakthrough T-Cell Therapy Offers New Hope for Children with Deadly Brain Tumors
stories.summary: Children's National Hospital's multitargeted T-cell therapy shows encouraging early results for children with deadly brain tumors like DIPG with fewer severe side effects.

stories.headline: Sea Turtle Nesting Reaches Record High on Tybee Island
stories.summary: Tybee Island celebrates its best nesting season ever with 39 sea turtle nests, a milestone 30 years of dedicated protection made possible.

stories.headline: Scientists Regrow Eye Vessels and Restore Vision in Damaged Retinas
stories.summary: Duke engineers grew specialized retinal blood vessel cells that fully restored vision in diseased mouse eyes, opening doors to treating human vision loss.

stories.headline: Philippines' Rarest Deer Population Surges with Calves Born in Reclaimed Habitats
stories.summary: Critically endangered tamaraws jump 12% to 425 animals, with observers spotting young calves in areas previously empty, proving conservation works.

stories.headline: World's First Hydrogen Train Rolls Out: Zero Emissions from Power to Rails
stories.summary: Switzerland and Sardinia unveiled the world's first hydrogen train for narrow-gauge tracks, engineered from scratch to fit the region's 950mm historic railway lines.

stories.headline: Young Gharial's Appearance Signals Assam's River Revival
stories.summary: A juvenile gharial spotted in Assam's Kekaidong River signals the rare and encouraging revival of the state's riverine ecosystems and biodiversity.
